name: B-21 Raider
description: Next-generation American stealth strategic bomber designed to penetrate advanced integrated air defense systems and deliver conventional or nuclear ordnance globally.

specialAbilities.name: Deep Penetration Strike
specialAbilities.description: Extremely low observability allows penetration of the most advanced air defense networks without detection.

specialAbilities.name: Nuclear Capable
specialAbilities.description: Certified to deliver B61-12 tactical nuclear weapons, providing strategic deterrence capability.
